settings.hero_headline: For the day that changes everything.
settings.hero_body: Bridal jewellery should be as personal as the person wearing it. Each piece is made to order, set in 18K gold, and crafted to be passed down.

settings.label: THE SOLITAIRE
settings.subtext:
A brilliant-cut solitaire in 18K gold, the ring you'll wear every day for the rest of your life. We'll find the right stone together.

Each setting is made to order. We work with you on the cut, the carat, and the gold, so the ring feels like yours from the first wearing.

settings.caption: Each ring is made to order in 18K gold.
Stones hand-selected for clarity and fit.

settings.text: Made for moments that last a lifetime.

settings.caption: From sketch to setting, by appointment.

settings.label: THE WEDDING BAND
settings.subtext:
The companion to the solitaire. A simple, hand-finished band in 18K gold, made to wear next to the engagement ring for a lifetime.

Available smooth or pavé-set, in white gold, gold, or rose gold. Sized to your finger and made to order.
